transcript: Speaker A: क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I sleeping. "I am sleeping" बोलना चाहिए। और थोड़ा फॉर्मल बोलना हो तो "I'm getting some sleep" भी कह सकते हैं। [I sleeping. You should say "I am sleeping". And if you want to speak a bit formally, you can also say "I'm getting some sleep".] Speaker A: अच्छा, ऐसा है क्या? मैं इंग्लिश कैसे सीखूं? [Oh, is that so? How do I learn English?] Speaker B: मेरे साथ रोज़ सिर्फ 15 minutes प्रैक्टिस करो। एक महीने में ही इंग्लिश सीख जाओगे। [Practice with me for just 15 minutes every day. You will learn English in just one month.] Speaker A: पर ये तो काफी महंगा होगा ना? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। सिर्फ एक रुपये में पूरी ऐप ट्राई कर सकते हो। 50 लाख से ज़्यादा लोग मेरे साथ इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [Not at all. You can try the entire app for just one rupee. More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me.] Speaker A: वाओ! फिर ज्वाइन कैसे करूं? [Wow! Then how do I join?] Speaker B: अभी MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू कर दो। [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: KYA KAR RAHE [WHAT ARE YOU DOING], I sleeping, I am sleeping, GETTING SOME SLEEP, AISHA HAI [IS IT SO], SIRF 15 MINUTES [ONLY 15 MINUTES], EK MAHINE [ONE MONTH], MEHANGA [EXPENSIVE], MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, 50 LAKH, WOW, JOIN KAISE [HOW TO JOIN], MySivi AI English Speaking App, Installing..., Master Spoken Eng, Sharpen your English with 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi fast, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI robot lying in bed next to a man corrects his English grammar and introduces the MySivi app. The robot explains that users can practice English for 15 minutes daily and offers a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
